title: phlomoides umbrosa var. ovalifolia
intro: Phlomoides umbrosa var. ovalifolia, also known as a type of Chinese sage or Phlomis, is a plant species within the family Lamiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Phlomoides umbrosa var. ovalifolia include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as providing relief from anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
